objective: Use the V3.55 JoinQuant limited-window adjusted proxy to verify the V3.53 label-generation chain without creating performance evidence.
forbidden: Do not run IC, hit rate, state validation, portfolio backtest, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, or model promotion.
Do not claim full-history performance from the limited JoinQuant trial window.
Do not treat adjusted proxy as official total-return index.
acceptance: The proxy source must pass V3.53-style source validation under limited-window thresholds.
A limited signal panel must be constructed only from dates with sufficient future source observations.
Forward labels must be generated for 1/5/20/60 horizons.
The report must clearly label results as short-window technical chain validation.
